stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Tilize RM input to tiles, immediately untilize back to RM. Tests full reader-compute-writer data path.

stages.name: center_and_square
stages.description: Add reduce_row for mean, subtract mean (COL broadcast), and square centered values. Tests reduce scaler fill, row reduction, and broadcast subtraction.

failure_history.suggested_action: Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.

stages.name: normalize
stages.description: Add variance computation (reduce_row on squared centered), add epsilon with rsqrt, and multiply centered by inv_std. Full layer_norm without affine transform.
stages.reference_body: mean = input.mean(-1, keepdim=True); centered = input - mean; var = centered.pow(2).mean(-1, keepdim=True); centered / torch.sqrt(var + 1e-5)

stages.name: affine
stages.description: Add gamma/beta reading, tilize gamma/beta once at start, multiply by gamma (ROW broadcast), add beta (ROW broadcast). Full layer_norm with affine transform.
stages.extra_setup:
gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1])
beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1])
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma_tt = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
beta_tt = ttnn.from_torch(beta, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
